title: Nan Qi Shu: Book of Southern Qi, Selection 3
description: From Nan Qi Shu: Book of Southern Qi: chapter 3
introduction: From Nan Qi Shu: Book of Southern Qi: chapter 3

translation.text: From Nan Qi Shu: Book of Southern Qi: A foundational chapter of one of China's official Twenty-Four Histories, recording the deeds, institutions, and biographies of an entire dynasty.
